name: feishu-ai-im-collab-assistant
description: Agent-Pilot: IM-driven office collaboration assistant for Feishu competition.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @agent-pilot/api" "npm run dev -w @agent-pilot/web"
scripts.dev:e2e: cross-env AGENT_LLM_MODE=mock OFFICE_ADAPTER=mock LARK_STATE_PATH=:memory: TASK_STATE_PATH=:memory: ENABLE_TEST_ENDPOINTS=true API_PORT=18878 VITE_PROXY_API_ORIGIN=http://localhost:18878 concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @agent-pilot/api" "npm run dev:e2e -w @agent-pilot/web"
scripts.deploy:web:cloudflare: npm run build:web && npx --yes wrangler@4.87.0 pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name feishu-ai-im-collab-assistant
